app.title: ReSpeaker Console
app.description: Configure, monitor, and inspect the XCore XVF3800 voice processor

app.title: ReSpeaker Console
app.subtitle: Configure, monitor, and inspect the XCore XVF3800 voice processor over USB

device.title: USB Devices
device.empty: No ReSpeaker devices detected. Plug one in and press Scan.

led.title: LED Ring
led.colorDisabledHint: Color is controlled by the selected effect for modes other than Breath or Single.

config.title: Parameter Catalog
config.selectHint: Pick a parameter on the left to read or update its value on the device.
config.restoreDefaultsOk: Configuration cleared. Reboot the device to load factory defaults.

reboot.title: Reboot Device
reboot.description: This will restart the device. The USB connection will be lost and the device will re-enumerate.

saveConfig.title: Save to Flash
saveConfig.description: Current settings will be permanently saved to the device flash memory. This cannot be undone.

import.title: Import Configuration
import.description: This will overwrite current device settings with values from the preset file.

restoreDefaults.title: Restore Factory Defaults
restoreDefaults.description: This will clear the saved configuration and revert all parameters to their factory defaults. The device will need to be rebooted for changes to take full effect.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the appearance and language of the app

shortcut.title: Shortcuts
shortcut.showMainDesc: Use shortcut to quickly show the main window

prompts.confirmRelease: Continue with version update and tag creation?
prompts.pushNow: Push commit and tag to remote now?

messages.invalidChoice: Invalid choice, defaulting to patch release.
messages.pushSkipped: Skipped push. You can push later with:

errors.cargoVersionNotFound: Failed to locate version in Cargo.toml
errors.cargoPackageNameNotFound: Failed to locate package name in Cargo.toml
errors.cargoLockVersionNotFound: Failed to locate version in Cargo.lock
errors.releaseStagingIncomplete: Release staging is incomplete. Staged files: {{stagedFiles}}
errors.workingTreeNotClean: Working tree is not clean. Please commit or stash your changes first.
errors.remoteTagExists: Remote tag {{tag}} already exists on origin.
errors.branchNotMain: Releases must be created from the main branch. Current branch: {{branch}}
errors.versionMismatch: Version mismatch detected. package.json={{packageVersion}}, tauri.conf.json={{tauriVersion}}, Cargo.toml={{cargoVersion}}, Cargo.lock={{cargoLockVersion}}
errors.packageVersionInvalid: package.json version is missing or invalid
errors.tauriVersionInvalid: src-tauri/tauri.conf.json version is missing or invalid
errors.invalidLang: Invalid --lang value. Use zh or en.
